title: Who Is Wes Streeting, the Cabinet Minister Who Just Resigned From Keir Starmer’s Government?
summary_full: Mr. Streeting attributes his ability to connect with a range of voters to his  background. He was the first in his family to graduate from college and his grandfather went to prison for armed robbery.
summary_public: Mr. Streeting attributes his ability to connect with a range of voters to his  background. He was the first in his family to graduate from college and his grandfather went to prison for armed robbery.
